title: Data Dictionary for allegheny_dog_licenses.csv
description:
**Description**

This dataset contains 50,013 records of dog licensing information from a U.S. jurisdiction. Each record is identified by a unique surrogate numeric ID and includes details such as the type of license, breed, color, name, owner's ZIP code, an expiration year (uniformly set to 2099), and the timestamp when the record entered the system. The data span more than two decades (2003‑2026) for record validity dates, but most records cluster early in that period. While a few fields contain missing values (e.g., 1 breed entry and 50 color entries), the dataset is otherwise complete, with no duplicate IDs.

**Notable Characteristics**

- **Cardinality & “Other” categories** – Many fields have high cardinality, leading to large “Other (N)” buckets: DogName (≈ 92 % of records), OwnerZip (≈ 64 %), Breed (≈ 58 %) and Color (≈ 33 %).  
- **Skewed distributions** – License types are heavily concentrated in the top five categories (~80 % of records). Similar skewness is observed for breed, color, and valid‑date timestamps.  
- **Uniform expiration year** – All licenses expire in 2099, indicating a placeholder or policy that does not reflect actual expiry variation.  
- **Temporal spread** – Valid dates range from January 2003 to July 2026, with the bulk of entries recorded between 2005 and 2010.  
- **Missing values** – Only one breed record and fifty color records are null; all other fields are fully populated.  
- **Potential PII** – Dog names and owner ZIP codes contain personally identifiable information that should be handled in compliance with privacy regulations.  
- **Data quality** – The presence of large “Other” categories can obscure fine‑grained analysis, and the constant expiration year limits temporal utility.

_id.title: Record Unique Identifier
_id.description: A surrogate numeric identifier that uniquely distinguishes each dog license record.

LicenseType.title: Dog License Type
LicenseType.description: Classification of the dog's license indicating its duration and any special status such as lifetime or senior.

Color.title: Dog Color
Color.description: Primary color(s) of the dog, expressed as one or more descriptive terms.

DogName.title: Dog Name
DogName.description: Given name assigned to the dog by its owner; part of the dog's identity profile along with breed and color.

OwnerZip.title: Owner ZIP Code
OwnerZip.description: Five‑digit United States postal code of the dog's owner's residence.

ExpYear.title: License Expiration Year
ExpYear.description: Calendar year in which the dog’s license expires. In this dataset, all licenses expire in 2099.

ValidDate.title: Record Valid Date
ValidDate.description: Timestamp indicating when this dog record became valid or was entered into the system.
